app_data.title: Pillars of Eternity
app_data.description: Prepare to be enchanted by a world where the choices you make and the paths you choose shape your destiny. Obsidian Entertainment, the developer of Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, together with Paradox Interactive is proud to present Pillars of Eternity.

app_data.title: Monster Hunter: World
app_data.description: Welcome to a new world! In Monster Hunter: World, the latest installment in the series, you can enjoy the ultimate hunting experience, using everything at your disposal to hunt monsters in a new world teeming with surprises and excitement.

app_data.title: Cities: Skylines II
app_data.description: Raise a city from the ground up and transform it into a thriving metropolis with the most realistic city builder ever. Push your creativity and problem-solving to build on a scale you've never experienced. With deep simulation and a living economy, this is world-building without limits.

app_data.title: Baldur's Gate 3
app_data.description: Baldur’s Gate 3 is a story-rich, party-based RPG set in the universe of Dungeons & Dragons, where your choices shape a tale of fellowship and betrayal, survival and sacrifice, and the lure of absolute power.

recentReview.tooltip: 过去 30 天内的 3,602 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。

totalReview.tooltip: 此游戏的 59,096 篇用户评测中有 88% 为好评。

app_data.title: Sea of Stars
app_data.description: Sea of Stars is a turn-based RPG inspired by the classics. It tells the story of two Children of the Solstice who will combine the powers of the sun and moon to perform Eclipse Magic, the only force capable of fending off the monstrous creations of the evil alchemist known as The Fleshmancer.

app_data.title: Cataclismo
app_data.description: The Cataclismo left us broken. Construct fortresses and defend against waves of Horrors in this mix of tower defense and real-time strategy. Lead an expedition beyond the gates of the last city, and reclaim mist-shrouded ruins as you rebuild humanity—stone by stone.

app_data.title: MONSTER HUNTER RISE
app_data.description: Rise to the challenge and join the hunt! In Monster Hunter Rise, the latest installment in the award-winning and top-selling Monster Hunter series, you’ll become a hunter, explore brand new maps and use a variety of weapons to take down fearsome monsters as part of an all-new storyline.

totalReview.tooltip: 此游戏的 48,672 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。

app_data.title: STARFIELD
app_data.description: Starfield is the first new universe in 25 years from Bethesda Game Studios, the award-winning creators of The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim and Fallout 4.

app_data.title: Hi-Fi RUSH
app_data.description: Feel the beat as wannabe rockstar Chai and his ragtag team fight against an evil megacorp with raucous rhythm combat! From Tango Gameworks comes Hi-Fi RUSH, an all-new action game where the world syncs to the music.

recentReview.tooltip: 过去 30 天内的 769 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。

totalReview.tooltip: 此游戏的 15,157 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。

app_data.title: Legend of Mortal
app_data.description: The game world is set in a turbulent state and the mighty Tang-Man declines. The threats from the old enemies keep coming one after another.As a nobody, will you choose either to leave yourself out of it or to fight for Tang-Man's future and turning the tide? The journey of yours,is unpredictable.

app_data.title: DAVE THE DIVER
app_data.description: DAVE THE DIVER is a casual, singleplayer adventure RPG featuring deep-sea exploration and fishing during the day and sushi restaurant management at night. Join Dave and his quirky friends as they seek to uncover the secrets of the mysterious Blue Hole.

recentReview.tooltip: 过去 30 天内的 24,617 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。

totalReview.tooltip: 此游戏的 36,161 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。

app_data.title: Sanfu
app_data.description: 2000年，山城市新闻频道的电视画面莫名跳出一则旧广告，而广告的代言人是已经去世的特异功能少年——三眼神童。有传闻三眼神童的亡魂劫持了电视信号。 调查局受命展开调查。随着调查的深入，一个藏在黑暗处的犯罪团伙逐渐浮出水面。

1888160.title: ARMORED CORE™ VI FIRES OF RUBICON™

app_data.title: ARMORED CORE™ VI FIRES OF RUBICON™
app_data.description: A new action game based on the concept of the ARMORED CORE series that uses the knowledge gained from FromSoftware's recent action game development.

app_data.title: Ghost Trick: Phantom Detective
app_data.description: Ghost Trick: Phantom Detective, the classic puzzle-solving mystery adventure directed by Ace Attorney creator Shu Takumi, is back! This long-awaited HD remaster features upgraded visuals and sound and new gallery content.

app_data.description: This game is a brand-new entry in the OCTOPATH TRAVELER series, the first installment of which was initially released in 2018 and sold over 3 million copies worldwide.

app_data.title: LIVE A LIVE
app_data.description: The legend is alive! LIVE A LIVE, originally only released for the Super Famicom in Japan, is being revived on Steam! Experience this legendary RPG, brought alive in the same HD-2D visual style as OCTOPATH TRAVELER.

app_data.title: Persona 5 Tactica
app_data.description: Join the Phantom Thieves as they lead an uprising of the heart! Assemble an all-star team of heroes in a brand-new story in this thrilling combat adventure set in Persona’s iconic universe.
